macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Supreme Court Strikes Down Trump's Tariffs Under IEEPA
items.summary: The US Supreme Court ruled 6-3 against President Trump's use of the International Emergency Economic Powers Act for most new tariffs on February 20, boosting risk assets with stocks rising and the dollar softening. Trump later announced an increase in global tariffs to 15% from 10%, potentially impacting markets.

items.title: Nifty 50 Bounces Back Above 25,400 After Tariff Ruling
items.summary: India's Nifty 50 rose 0.5% on February 20 following a prior 1.4% drop, holding above 25,400 support amid US Supreme Court verdict on Trump tariffs; potential upside to 25,900-26,000 if sustained. Bank Nifty gained 0.71%, recouping losses with bullish signals.

items.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Gain, ASX 200 Futures Rise Post-Ruling
items.summary: Major US benchmarks including S&P 500 and Nasdaq closed higher near session bests after Supreme Court tariff decision; ASX 200 futures up 0.17% signaling opening gains. Markets react positively to reduced tariff drag on growth.

items.title: Nasdaq Consolidates Below Key Highs Amid Bearish Signals
items.summary: Nasdaq trades cautiously below 26,150 with moving averages converging and 20-day SMA crossing below 50-day, risking drop to 23,980 or lower Fibonacci levels like 23,300. Awaits macroeconomic catalysts like global growth and central bank policies.

items.title: S&P 500 Stuck in Range-Bound Start to 2026, History Suggests Upside
items.summary: S&P 500 off to lackluster 2026 start but history indicates positive year-end in similar range-bound periods; energy sector up over 20% YTD on oil prices and AI demand, with standout performers like Sandisk surging 150%.

items.title: G10 Data Unlikely to Shift Central Bank Rate Expectations
items.summary: Upcoming US ADP employment, consumer confidence, jobless claims, PPI, and Canada Q4 GDP expected to leave Fed and BoC rate bets unchanged; Fed can remain patient on easing. Structurally bearish USD due to US fiscal and trade policy risks.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops Over $20,000 in Value in 2026 Amid Market Volatility
items.summary: Bitcoin has experienced a significant decline of over $20,000 in 2026, marking a sharp market shift and highlighting ongoing volatility. This downturn impacts investor sentiment, with spot Bitcoin ETFs recording net outflows.

items.title: Ethereum Faces Pressure from Founder Sales and Whale Losses
items.summary: Ethereum trades below $2,075 under pressure from Vitalik Buterin's resumed ETH sales, including a recent $6.95 million withdrawal, and unrealized losses across whale cohorts. Downside momentum persists amid macro pressures and thinning liquidity.

items.title: Crypto Market Consolidates as Bitcoin Holds $68,500 and Ethereum $2,050 Amid Macro Overhang
items.summary: Bitcoin trades around $68,500 and Ethereum near $2,050 in a range-bound pattern, with BTC spot ETFs seeing $285M outflows and ETH inflows of $78M. Markets await liquidity catalysts amid elevated Nasdaq correlation and trade tensions.

items.title: Multiple Platforms Announce Delistings: ONUS Pro Ends OMVNDC Trading, HyperLiquid Votes on OM
items.summary: ONUS Pro will delist OMVNDC and halt trading at 03:00 UTC on February 23, 2026, urging position adjustments. HyperLiquid validators vote around 08:00 UTC on February 23 to potentially delist OM, with automatic settlements if approved.

items.title: ProBit Global to Terminate All Services on February 26, 2026
items.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange ProBit Global will end all services on February 26, 2026, at 08:00 UTC+8, with spot trading ceasing earlier on January 28. Users must withdraw assets promptly to avoid losses.

items.title: SEC to Decide on Increasing IBIT Bitcoin ETF Options Position Limit by February 24
items.summary: The U.S. SEC will rule by February 24 on raising iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) options position limits from 250,000 to 1,000,000 contracts. This comes ahead of President Trump's State of the Union address on February 24.

items.title: Bitcoin for Corporations Conference Kicks Off at Strategy World 2026
items.summary: Day 1 of the Bitcoin for Corporations event at Strategy World 2026 in Las Vegas features speakers like Michael Saylor and others discussing corporate Bitcoin strategies. The live session highlights institutional adoption trends.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Generative AI Matches Human Experts in Medical Data Analysis
items.summary: Researchers demonstrated that generative AI can analyze complex medical datasets as quickly or faster than human expert teams, dramatically reducing the time needed to process health data and move from data to discovery.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Code Security with 500+ Bug Detection
items.summary: Anthropic released Claude Code Security, an AI tool that identified over 500 undetected bugs in production code, causing significant movement in cybersecurity stocks.

items.title: Machine Learning Advances Quantum Chemistry Precision
items.summary: Using machine learning, researchers solved a central precision and stability problem in quantum chemistry for organic molecules through the Heidelberg method.

items.title: Education Technology Market Projected to Reach $348.41 Billion by 2030
items.summary: The education technology sector is experiencing rapid transformation driven by AI and machine learning innovations, with AI-driven personalized learning and immersive VR experiences enhancing student engagement.

items.title: Optical Processor Enables AI Computing at Speed of Light
items.summary: Researchers at Tsinghua University developed the Optical Feature Extraction Engine (OFE2), processing data at 12.5 GHz using light rather than electricity, demonstrating improved accuracy and reduced power demand for AI tasks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: New Blood Interactive's Dave Oshry Discusses Dungeons of Dusk RPG and Switch 2 Ports
items.summary: Dave Oshry reveals details on upcoming Dungeons of Dusk RPG launching later this year on Steam, Epic Games Store, and Switch 2, alongside progress on Dusk at 120fps with mouse controls on Switch 2 and delays for Amid Evil console ports due to prioritization of projects like Ultrakill.

items.title: Five New Steam Games Highlighted for February 23, Including Horripilant and Love Eternal
items.summary: PC Gamer spotlights lesser-known recent Steam releases like Horripilant (Feb 21), Love Eternal (Feb 20), F-22: Air Dominance Fighter, and Screaming Head, amid the daily flood of new titles.

items.title: New Xbox Boss Asha Sharma Declares 'No Tolerance for Bad AI' in Games
items.summary: Xbox's new leader Asha Sharma, with an AI background at Microsoft, emphasizes that games must prioritize great human-created stories over poor AI implementations.

items.title: Fantasy Critic League Week 8: High on Life 2 Score Drops, Replaced Release Delayed
items.summary: In the TAGN Fantasy Critic League, High on Life 2's score fell from 77.2 to 76.1, Replaced's release shifted from March 12 to April 14, 2026, and Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse was bid on for $20.

items.title: Guide to Best New Video Games Launching February 23 to March 1, 2026
items.summary: Screenhub lists major upcoming video game releases across PC, PlayStation, and Xbox from February 23 to March 1, 2026.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Waaree Energies Announces India's Largest Battery Gigafactory in Andhra Pradesh
items.summary: Waaree Energies plans to establish India's largest integrated lithium-ion battery gigafactory at Rambilli in Anakapalli district, Andhra Pradesh, announced on February 19, 2026, boosting the country's energy storage and clean-energy manufacturing.

items.title: Haj Wrist Band Smart Wearable Launched for Haj Modernization
items.summary: India launched the Haj Wrist Band, a smart wearable device, as part of modernization measures for the Haj pilgrimage to enhance service delivery and citizen engagement.

items.title: NPCI Launches UPI Payments for Foreign Visitors Without Indian Mobile or Bank Account
items.summary: A new UPI initiative allows foreign visitors to make payments without an Indian mobile number or bank account, expanding digital payment accessibility.

items.title: Commonwealth Connect Forum in Ahmedabad to Drive Economic Partnerships for 2030 Games
items.summary: India Global Forum hosts the inaugural Commonwealth Connect Forum on February 23, 2026, in Ahmedabad, anchoring a UK West Midlands delegation to foster investments in advanced manufacturing, clean energy, and sports infrastructure ahead of the 2030 Games.
